turns: I keep hearing people talk about cloud storage, but I still do not have a very clear picture of what it really is. Just explain it in a straightforward way first, not as a full lecture.
I have a deadline tomorrow and I am stuck on where to restart. Just help me identify the most important next move first, not a whole rescue plan.

I need to pick a gift, but I have not narrowed anything down yet. Help me with the first filter I should use, not a giant list of options.
I do not feel terrible or anything. I just feel a little alone tonight. You can just stay with me for a couple of lines, no need to turn this into advice.
Something small annoyed me way more than it should have. I mostly just want to vent for a second, not get a whole mindset reset.
